content_angle: The flip turn is the most overlooked time-saver in competitive swimming — a three-step technique fix can recover 0.5–1 second per wall, adding up to 4–8 seconds over a 400m race. Anchored to NZ Age Group Championships racing today (April 8-9).
key_insight: NZ Age Group Swimming Championships run April 8-9 making technique-focused race performance content highly timely; flip turn improvements are a proven high-save format delivering measurable, race-specific time savings that competitive swimmers immediately want to share.
